title: PR C — OpenCode plugin embed-and-write implementation plan
summary: Task-by-task implementation plan for wiring specgraph init to write the OpenCode plugin TS file from an embedded canonical source.
notes: Implementation plan document, not a formal ADR/PRD/SPEC. Contains file-level task checklists and references a separate design doc; classified as DOC (context only) since it describes execution steps rather than decisions, requirements, or contracts. Referenced design doc may itself be a SPEC and should be classified separately.
